productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherite Black Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros handbag collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bag is spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets that allow you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 30 cmWidth: 43 cmDepth: 13 cmMade of leatherite with a two tone colour for durability and styleHas one large main zipped compartment with two inner zipped compartments and organiser sleeves for essentialsTwo short handles woven through metallic loops for carrying easeOne zipped pocket at the backOne long adjustable and removable strapBranded zips and brand name appliqué d on the frontMetallic stud design on the front of the bag for enhanced styleCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
